# BeautifulDiagram AI

> AI-powered intelligent visualization platform. Generate professional diagrams with natural language.

## What is BeautifulDiagram?

BeautifulDiagram is an open-source AI visualization platform that transforms natural language and multimodal inputs into professional diagrams. It uses a LangGraph-powered multi-agent architecture with 6 specialized agents:

- **Mind Map Agent**: Generates structured, interactive mind maps
- **Flowchart Agent**: Creates business process flows with React Flow
- **Data Chart Agent**: Visualizes data with ECharts (20+ chart types)
- **Architecture Agent**: Produces cloud architecture diagrams with Draw.io
- **Mermaid Agent**: Generates technical diagrams (sequence, Gantt, class, etc.)
- **Infographic Agent**: Creates visual infographics with AntV

## Key Features

- Natural language input for diagram generation
- Multimodal support (upload images, PDFs, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX)
- Real-time streaming with design concept visibility
- Message branching and version history
- Export to PNG/SVG
- Docker deployment ready

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, TailwindCSS 4.1, Zustand
- Backend: Python 3.13, FastAPI, LangGraph, SQLModel
- Database: PostgreSQL 16
- Deployment: Docker, Nginx
